wikitext:
{{Enemy Infobox|Ceremonial Beast|2}}{{Power Infobox|Plow|2}}{{Power Infobox|Ringing|2}}
'''Ceremonial Beast''' is a {{2|Bosses|Boss}} found in the {{2|Overgrowth}}.

== Pattern ==
{{Intents|Ceremonial Beast|2}}
The Ceremonial Beast has two phases.

'''Phase 1:'''
*Uses {{Int|Ceremonial Beast|Stamp||2}} on the first turn, gaining {{BD|Plow||2}}.
*Then uses {{Int|Ceremonial Beast|Plow||2}} every turn.
When its HP drops to the {{BD|Plow||2}} threshold (150, or {{Asc|9|160|2}}), it becomes {{BD|Stunned||2}} and loses all {{BD|Strength||2}}.

'''Phase 2:''' After being stunned, repeats this three-move cycle:
# {{Int|Ceremonial Beast|Beast Cry||2}}
# {{Int|Ceremonial Beast|Stomp||2}}
# {{Int|Ceremonial Beast|Crush||2}}

== Notes ==
* {{BD|Plow||2}} acts as a HP threshold: when the Ceremonial Beast's HP drops to the {{BD|Plow||2}} amount or below, it is {{KW|Stunned||2}} and loses all accumulated {{BD|Strength||2}}. This effectively gives the player a free turn.
* {{BD|Ringing||2}} from {{Int|Ceremonial Beast|Beast Cry||2}} limits the player to playing only 1 card on that turn.
* During Phase 1, each {{Int|Ceremonial Beast|Plow||2}} grants 2 {{BD|Strength||2}}, but all of it is lost when the stun triggers. In Phase 2, {{Int|Ceremonial Beast|Crush||2}} grants 3 ({{Asc|9|4}}) {{BD|Strength||2}} that is retained permanently.

==Interactions==
===Synergies===
*{{BD|Block Next Turn||2}} ({{C|Dodge and Roll||2}}, {{C|Glitterstream||2}}, & {{C|Prolong||2}}.) can mitigate {{BD|Ringing||2}}'s card play limit.
**{{R|Sturdy Clamp||2}} can provide a similar benefit.
===Anti-Synergies===
* Effects that automate playing cards (such as {{C|Hellraiser||2}}, {{C|Mayhem||2}}, & {{R|History Course||2}}) can consume the singular card permitted by {{BD|Ringing||2}}.
**Similarly, {{C|Stampede||2}}'s triggered {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Attack|Attack|2}} may not play, provided the player already played a card prior during the turn.
*{{BD|Ringing||2}} makes cards that ''generate other cards'' to be played (such as {{C|Infernal Blade||2}}, {{C|Quasar||2}}, and {{C|Discovery||2}}) effectively useless.
*{{BD|Ringing||2}} stops {{BD|Echo Form||2}} from triggering.
